sentences.arabic: نَظَّفَ أَبْنَاءُ الْحَيِّ الشَّاطِئَ الْقَرِيبَ مِنَ الْمَدِينَةِ.
sentences.translation: Mještani su očistili plažu nedaleko od grada.
sentences.translationEn: The neighborhood residents cleaned the beach near the city.

sentences.arabic: جَمَعُوا الْقُمَامَةَ وَوَضَعُوهَا فِي أَكْيَاسٍ كَبِيرَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Skupili su smeće i stavili ga u velike vreće.
sentences.translationEn: They collected the garbage and put it in large bags.

sentences.arabic: اسْتَغْرَقَ الْعَمَلُ ثَلَاثَ سَاعَاتٍ وَانْتَهَى الشَّاطِئُ نَظِيفًا.
sentences.translation: Posao je trajao tri sata i plaža je postala čista.
sentences.translationEn: The work took three hours and the beach ended up clean.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ الْمُتَطَوِّعُونَ إِنَّهُمْ سَيَعُودُونَ كُلَّ شَهْرٍ.
sentences.translation: Volonteri su rekli da će se vraćati svaki mjesec.
sentences.translationEn: The volunteers said they will return every month.
